Why Funitize

The Most Fun Shopify App
Ever Created

Funitize creates memorable shopping experiences. You don't want your customers to forget you.

Premade & Custom Animations

Choose from stunning premade falling effects — or upload your own images for completely custom animations unique to your brand.

Shopify Popups & CTAs

Add a clickable popup to your store in just a few clicks. Use one we've already made or create your own with a custom image and message that match your style. Send visitors exactly where you want them to go whether that's a product, collection, sale, event, your social media, a partner page, or any internal or external link.

Schedule Up to 1 Year Ahead

Pre-schedule animations with precise dates and times. Set up Black Friday, Christmas, Valentine's Day — all at once, all automated.

Zero Coding Required

Install from the Shopify App Store and your effects are live in minutes. Works with any Shopify theme, any store, any niche.

Page-Specific Effects

Show any types of effects you want on different pages. Check all of the pages on this website to see different types of falling effects.

Works With Shopify Checkout

Extend your festive experience all the way through the purchase journey — Funitize integrates seamlessly with Shopify Checkout.

See It Live

Add effects

The Team Behind the Magic

Built by People Who
Love Shopify

We're two Shopify obsessives who decided to build the most awesome Shopify app, Funitize, to bring fun and happiness to as many Shopify websites and people in the world as possible. Funitize life!

Veronica Baljak

Growth, Partnerships & Vision ✨

Dropshipping expert and e-commerce influencer with a passion for growth, partnerships, and manifesting big visions. Veronica brings the magic of connection — between brands, between people, and between Shopify stores and their customers.

Connect on LinkedIn

Stan Peev

Shopify Expert & App Creator

Shopify agency veteran, tech innovator, and founder of Grumspot Agency. Creator of the SelfServe Order Editing App and Funitize. Stan has helped hundreds of Shopify stores scale and built these tools because he saw real problems merchants face every day.

Connect on LinkedIn

Our Mission 🚀

Every Shopify store deserves to be memorable. We built Funitize so any store owner — no matter their technical skill — can create magical, festive, unforgettable experiences for their customers. Fun is good for business.

Contact

We'd Love to Hear From You

Using Funitize, working on your Shopify store, or just exploring the app? Feel free to reach out anytime.

If you have a question, found an issue, or want to suggest an improvement, send us a message. We read every email, and a lot of Funitize updates come directly from feedback from Shopify merchants.

Whether it's something small or something technical, we're happy to help. You'll get a real reply from someone who understands how Shopify stores actually run.

Use the form below and let us know what's on your mind.

Instagram

And don't forget — business is serious, but it should still be fun.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: February 2025 · Questions? [email protected]

The Short Version ✨

We built Funitize to be fun, not creepy. We collect only what we need to make the app work, we never sell your data, and we keep everything secure. That's it.

What We Collect

When you install Funitize, we access basic store information required by Shopify to deliver the app — including your store URL, email address, and theme data. We use this to configure and display your animations correctly.

We collect basic analytics about how the app is used (which effects are popular, how often the app is opened) to help us improve Funitize. This data is anonymized and aggregated — we can't trace it back to individual stores.

What We Don't Do

We do not sell your data to anyone. Ever. We do not share your information with third parties for advertising. We do not store your customers' personal information. We do not access any data beyond what Shopify's app permissions require.

Cookies

Funitize uses cookies only for essential app functionality — remembering your animation preferences and keeping your session active. We do not use tracking cookies or advertising cookies.

Your Rights

You can uninstall Funitize at any time through your Shopify admin. Upon uninstall, we delete your store data within 30 days. You can request deletion of your data at any time by emailing [email protected].

Contact Us

Questions about privacy? Email us at [email protected] — we're real humans and we actually respond.

Terms of Service

Last updated: February 2025 · Questions? [email protected]

Welcome! ✨

These Terms of Service govern your use of Funitize ("the App"), developed by TIKTOKTACTIC AGENCY LLC. By installing and using Funitize, you agree to these terms. They're written in plain English because we don't like lawyer-speak either.

Using Funitize

Funitize is a Shopify app that adds animations, popups, and effects to your store. You may use it for any lawful commercial purpose on your Shopify store. You may not use Funitize to display content that is illegal, harmful, or violates Shopify's terms of service.

Subscription & Payment

Funitize is available for $11.95 per year, billed annually through Shopify Billing. A 2-day free trial is available for new installations. All charges are processed by Shopify. You may cancel your subscription at any time through your Shopify admin.

Intellectual Property

The Funitize app, its animations, and its code remain the intellectual property of TIKTOKTACTIC AGENCY LLC. Custom images and graphics that you upload remain your property.

Limitation of Liability

We work hard to make Funitize reliable and bug-free, but we can't guarantee it will be perfect at all times. Our liability is limited to the amount you paid for the app in the past 12 months.

Changes to These Terms

We may update these terms from time to time. We'll notify you via email and through the Shopify App Store if we make significant changes.

Contact

Questions? [email protected] — we'll get back to you quickly.
